title: The American Dream
tmdbOverview: No one would have bet on Jérémy, stuck behind the counter of a video store, or on Bouna, who cleans airports. With no money, no connections, and painfully poor English, who could have predicted they’d one day become big-name agents in the NBA? What they lack in experience, they will make up for in audacity, while remaining true to their one credo, doing business with a human touch. Scouting raw talent while improvising their way up, they’ll fake it until they make it – chasing their American Dream and landing multi-million-dollar deals.
synopsis: The American Dream (2026) is a comedy film from France. It holds a solid 7.6 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 6 certification (BE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
